summary: Pretty good audience recording of a show that overcomes a rough start to deliver a ragingly good performance
review: The concert begins unevenly but finds its footing by the middle of the first set and then rolls into a strong, energetic show. The audience (AUD) source is described as "pretty good," with no major technical complaints noted.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review highlights a solid performance after an initial stumble and reports decent audience recording quality; limited data yields low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific audio issues mentioned; reviewer calls it "pretty good AUD" indicating acceptable clarity for an audience tape.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Starts bumpy, improves by mid‑first set and maintains a high‑energy, ragingly good vibe through the remainder of the concert.
